_comment: Single source of truth for provider secrets. Read by the server (config.ts), the setup script, and the doctor diagnostic. Add a provider here to make it appear in setup + doctor. 'secret: true' means the value is NEVER printed, logged, or echoed anywhere.

env.hint: 17-digit SteamID64 — look it up at https://steamid.io
Twitch app Client ID from https://dev.twitch.tv/console/apps
Twitch app Client Secret (New Secret) — powers accurate backlog hours
